meaning: not elsewhere included 别处不含
examples: Nei: It's because I had to get up really early this morning.
The bamboo book Nei Li of Shanghai Museum is very valuable document and worthy of further study.
On May 18th the New Economy Initiative (NEI), funded by ten foundations, announced grants to spur entrepreneurship and help car-suppliers diversify.
There is established an Export Promotion Cabinet to develop and coordinate the implementation of the NEI.
The National Export Initiative (NEI) shall be an Administration initiative to improve conditions that directly affect the private sector's ability to export.
